testcase.name: TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-01: Given I am authenticated, When I navigate to /biz, Then the URL is correct
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-02: Given I am on the page, When I inspect it, Then the "What would you like to do?" heading is shown
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-03: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Browse Digital" is visible and links to /biz/business/digital
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-04: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Browse Physical" is visible and links to /biz/business/physical
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-05: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Seller Dashboard" is visible and links to /biz/business/dashboard
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-06: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Website Builder" is visible and links to /biz/website-builder
TC-BIZ — Hub Landing › TC-BIZ-07: Given I am on the hub, When I inspect the links, Then "Marketplace" is visible and links to /app/marketplace
TC-BIZ — Browse Digital / Physical › TC-BIZ-08: Given I am on the hub, When I click "Browse Digital", Then I land on /biz/business/digital
TC-BIZ — Browse Digital / Physical › TC-BIZ-09: Given I am on the hub, When I click "Browse Physical", Then I land on /biz/business/physical
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-10: Given I have no store yet, When I open Seller Dashboard, Then I am routed to "Create Seller Profile"
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › platform\biz.spec.js:81:7 › TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-10: Given I have no store yet, When I open Seller Dashboard, Then I am routed to "Create Seller Profile" Error: expect(locator).toHaveText(expected) failed Locator: locator('h1, h2').first() Expected pattern: /create seller profile/i Received string: "Automated QA Test Store" Timeout: 5000ms Call log: - Expect "toHaveText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('h1, h2').first() 12 × locator resolved to

Automated QA Test Store

- unexpected value "Automated QA Test Store" 80 | 81 | test('TC-BIZ-10: Given I have no store yet, When I open Seller Dashboard, Then I am routed to "Create Seller Profile"', async ({ page }) => { > 82 | await expect(page.locator('h1, h2').first()).toHaveText(/create seller profile/i); | ^ 83 | }); 84 | 85 | test('TC-BIZ-11: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect it, Then a "Create Profile & Start Selling" button is visible', async ({ page }) => { at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-app\web\tests\platform\biz.spec.js:82:50 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-16_17-34-42\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Sell-a0ba4-d-to-Create-Seller-Profile--chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-16_17-34-42\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Sell-a0ba4-d-to-Create-Seller-Profile--chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-16_17-34-42\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Sell-a0ba4-d-to-Create-Seller-Profile--chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-11: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect it, Then a "Create Profile & Start Selling" button is visible
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › platform\biz.spec.js:85:7 › TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-11: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect it, Then a "Create Profile & Start Selling" button is visible
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('button', { name: /create profile.*start selling/i }) Expected: visible Timeout: 10000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /create profile.*start selling/i })
84 | 85 | test('TC-BIZ-11: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect it, Then a "Create Profile & Start Selling" button is visible', async ({ page }) => { > 86 | await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: /create profile.*start selling/i })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 87 | }); 88 | 89 | for (const [name, href] of [ at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-app\web\tests\platform\biz.spec.js:86:88

testcase.name: TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Dashboard: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Dashboard" links to /biz/business/dashboard
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Analytics: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Analytics" links to /biz/business/dashboard/analytics
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Digital-Products: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Digital Products" links to /biz/business/dashboard/digital-products
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Physical-Products: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Physical Products" links to /biz/business/dashboard/physical-products
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Orders: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Orders" links to /biz/business/dashboard/orders
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Cart: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Cart" links to /biz/business/dashboard/cart
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Store-Profile: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Store Profile" links to /biz/business/dashboard/store-profile
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Store-Settings: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Store Settings" links to /biz/business/dashboard/store-settings
TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-SIDEBAR-Ads: Given I am on the dashboard, When I inspect the sidebar, Then "Ads & Marketing" links to /app/business/ads

TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-PROFILE-FORM: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect the form, Then store name, tagline, description, logo, banner, website, and location fields are present
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › platform\biz.spec.js:112:7 › TC-BIZ — Seller Dashboard › TC-BIZ-PROFILE-FORM: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect the form, Then store name, tagline, description, logo, banner, website, and location fields are present
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByPlaceholder(/my awesome store/i) Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByPlaceholder(/my awesome store/i)
111 | 112 | test('TC-BIZ-PROFILE-FORM: Given I am on Create Seller Profile, When I inspect the form, Then store name, tagline, description, logo, banner, website, and location fields are present', async ({ page }) => { > 113 | await expect(page.getByPlaceholder(/my awesome store/i)).toBeVisible(); | ^ 114 | await expect(page.getByPlaceholder(/short phrase.*describes your store/i)).toBeVisible(); 115 | await expect(page.getByPlaceholder(/tell customers what you sell/i)).toBeVisible(); 116 | await expect(page.getByPlaceholder('https://yoursite.com')).toBeVisible(); at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-app\web\tests\platform\biz.spec.js:113:62

testcase.name: TC-BIZ — Cart › TC-BIZ-CART-01: Given I am authenticated, When I navigate to /biz/cart, Then the URL is correct
TC-BIZ — Cart › TC-BIZ-CART-02: Given my cart has nothing in it, When I open the cart, Then an empty-cart message is shown
TC-BIZ — Product Detail › TC-BIZ-PRODUCT-01: Given I am on Browse Digital, When I click a product, Then I land on its product detail page
TC-BIZ — Product Detail › TC-BIZ-PRODUCT-02: Given I am on a product detail page, When I inspect it, Then a product title is shown
TC-BIZ — Storefront › TC-BIZ-STORE-01: Given a seller has a public store, When I visit their store page, Then the seller name is shown as the heading
TC-BIZ — Alias Routes (/biz/digital, /biz/physical) › TC-BIZ-ALIAS-01: Given I navigate to /biz/digital directly, Then it shows the Digital Products listing with a search box
TC-BIZ — Alias Routes (/biz/digital, /biz/physical) › TC-BIZ-ALIAS-02: Given I navigate to /biz/physical directly, Then it shows the Physical Products listing
TC-BIZ — Alias Routes (/biz/digital, /biz/physical) › TC-BIZ-ALIAS-03: Given I navigate to /biz/dashboard directly, Then it behaves the same as /biz/business/dashboard
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › platform\biz.spec.js:176:7 › TC-BIZ — Alias Routes (/biz/digital, /biz/physical) › TC-BIZ-ALIAS-03: Given I navigate to /biz/dashboard directly, Then it behaves the same as /biz/business/dashboard Error: expect(locator).toHaveText(expected) failed Locator: locator('h1, h2').first() Expected pattern: /create seller profile/i Received string: "Automated QA Test Store" Timeout: 5000ms Call log: - Expect "toHaveText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('h1, h2').first() - waiting for" https://omre.ai/biz/business/dashboard" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://omre.ai/biz/business/dashboard" 3 × locator resolved to

My Store

- unexpected value "My Store" 6 × locator resolved to

Automated QA Test Store

- unexpected value "Automated QA Test Store" 177 | await page.goto('https://omre.ai/biz/dashboard', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' }); 178 | await page.waitForTimeout(2500); > 179 | await expect(page.locator('h1, h2').first()).toHaveText(/create seller profile/i); | ^ 180 | }); 181 | }); 182 | at C:\claude-folder\webapp-testing\omre-app\web\tests\platform\biz.spec.js:179:50 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-16_17-35-32\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Alia-d1637-e-as-biz-business-dashboard-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\test-results\2026-06-16_17-35-32\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Alia-d1637-e-as-biz-business-dashboard-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\test-results\2026-06-16_17-35-32\artifacts\platform-biz-TC-BIZ-—-Alia-d1637-e-as-biz-business-dashboard-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-BIZ — Functional: Seller Profile & Product (real CRUD, idempotent) › TC-BIZ-FUNC-01: Given I have no seller profile, When I fill and submit the form, Then the seller dashboard unlocks

TC-BIZ — Functional: Seller Profile & Product (real CRUD, idempotent) › TC-BIZ-FUNC-02: Given the dashboard is unlocked, When I cancel the Add Product form, Then no product is created and the modal closes

TC-BIZ — Functional: Seller Profile & Product (real CRUD, idempotent) › TC-BIZ-FUNC-03: Given the dashboard is unlocked, When I fill and submit the Add Product form, Then the product is created and appears in the listing
